key.name: Global

string.name: Active Sessions Manager Window State V2

dword.name: Append Number When Connecting Same Session

key.binary: 2c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff 22 01 00 00 ad 00 00 00 18 04 00 00 3a 02 00 00
ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00 ff ff ff 00

dword.name: Display Local Time for Remote Files
Display Themes Use Standard Titlebar Icons
Exit When Last Session Is Disconnected

key.binary: 2c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff 57 02 00 00 9f 00 00 00 2a 05 00 00 5e 03 00 00

dword.name: Hidden Menu Bar Can Be Accessed
Insert Pasted Text Between Quotation Characters
Launch New Windows in a Separate Process
Local Window on Bottom or Right

key.binary: 2c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff a9 03 00 00 7d 01 00 00 72 05 00 00 fc 02 00 00

dword.name: Never Use Cached File for Remote Editing
Preserve Window Size When Opening Sessions
Remote Edit Upload On Modify V2

string.name: Remote Port Forwarding Table Column Widths

dword.name: Script Directory Becomes CWD When Running Script

string.name: Search Engine Command For Selection Lookup
Session Manager Window State SFX V2

dword.name: Set locale environment variables for local shell
Show Prompt On Paste As Quotation
Show Status Bar In Full-Screen Mode
Status Bar Shows CAPS Lock State
Status Bar Shows NUM Lock State
Suppress Execute Escape Sequence Exit Codes
Suppress Mapped Key Is Default Warning
Suppress Read Only Session Options Warning
Swap Enter and Ctrl+Enter in Command Window
Treat CJK Ambiguous Chars As Wide
Use Default Session Color On Startup
Use Default Transfer Type For All Files
Warn When Opening Multiple Sessions Value

key.binary: 2c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff 88 00 00 00 37 00 00 00 3d 04 00 00 bb 02 00 00

dword.name: SCP Cisco ASA Force System Command Mode
Ignore 80-132 Column Switching When Maximized or Full Screen
Alternate Screen Output Added To Scrollback

key.binary: 2c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff 88 00 00 00 37 00 00 00 3d 04 00 00 bb 02 00 00

dword.name: Copy Translates ANSI Line Drawing Characters
Copy to clipboard as RTF and plain text
Use Symbolic Names For Non-Printable Characters
ZModem Force All Caps Filenames to Lower Case on Upload
Send Zmodem Init When Upload Starts
Generate Unique Log File Name When File In Use
Send Scroll Wheel Events To Remote
Use A Separate Transport For Every Connection
Disable STAT For SFTP Directory Validation
Use STAT For SFTP Directory Validation
SecureFX Use Control Address For Data Connections
AWS Use Delimiter To Group Keys
